'''Nimbia''' was the fourth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Nubus]] in the [[Nubus system]]. Located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], it was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]].
